text.title: MCP Server Catalog Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the mcp-servers methodology end-to-end.

step.name: list-service-inventory
step.action: Enumerate every service agents talk to (or want to). Sort by usage frequency.

step.name: search-mcp-registry
step.action: For each service, search registry. Note candidate packages.

step.name: score-each-candidate
step.action: For each candidate: install cmd, env vars, tool count, last release, security score (gitleaks + scope-min + maintenance). Recommendation: use / monitor / avoid.
step.decision-gate: If a category has no `use`-rated server, propose either: build a custom MCP (apply `mcp` methodology) OR document the gap.

step.name: publish-catalog
step.action: Render Markdown + JSON catalog. Commit; surface in team docs.

step.name: wire-quarterly-cadence
step.action: Set up a quarterly reminder + CI check that flags entries with `last_release > 90d`.
